comments.author: @WhereonEarth4K
comments.text:
👇 Everything we curated for this Iceland episode. Tours, books, cookbooks, travel resources.

*📚 BROWSE THE ICELAND COLLECTION*
  ◦ Every book, cookbook, and cultural item we curated for this episode → https://amzn.to/3S9Mmy1

*🛍 SEE OUR FULL W.O.E. STOREFRONT*
  ◦ Every destination Collection in one place → https://www.amazon.com/shop/whereonearth

*🎟 TOURS AND EXPERIENCES IN ICELAND*
  ◦ Golden Circle, volcanic eruption sites, glacier walks, and whale watching → https://shorturl.at/SvUKp
  ◦ Browse all Iceland experiences → https://shorturl.at/PA3Hk

*📖 PLAN YOUR ICELAND TRIP*
  ◦ Lonely Planet Iceland (2026-2027 Travel Guide) → https://amzn.to/4vydQMd
  ◦ The Little Book of the Icelanders: 50 Miniature Essays on the Quirks and Foibles of the Icelandic People, by Alda Sigmundsdottir → https://amzn.to/4xdx0Zu

*📚 GO DEEPER INTO ICELAND*
  ◦ How Iceland Changed the World: The Big History of a Small Island, by Egill Bjarnason → https://amzn.to/4e1PeUV
  ◦ Njal's Saga (Penguin Classics), the greatest of the medieval Icelandic sagas → https://amzn.to/49LNIVH

*🍲 BRING ICELAND HOME*
  ◦ North: The New Nordic Cuisine of Iceland by Gunnar Karl Gislason, foreword by Rene Redzepi → https://amzn.to/4ujKvEo
  ◦ Island on Fire: The Extraordinary Story of Laki, the Volcano That Turned Eighteenth-Century Europe Dark → https://amzn.to/4g41Ux6

replies.author: @WhereonEarth4K
replies.text: Really glad it came through that way — Iceland packs a remarkable amount of history into a very small space. More journeys on the way. 🙏

comments.author: @trueunrealglobe
comments.text: Every scene seemed carefully crafted to capture the beauty and uniqueness of the places being explored.

replies.author: @WhereonEarth4K
replies.text: Thank you — Iceland rewards that kind of attention. More journeys ahead. 🌿
